text: I wander through this angular, modern space, glass and text meeting at sharp edges. The bright light and clear signage give an aura of order, but the exhibition within draws me with curiosity. As I enter and stand before the wall marked R+D, the glow of technology and thoughtful presentation washes over me. I feel as though I am standing at a crossroads between past innovation and present contemplation, filled with a quiet reverence for human ingenuity—a slight awe, and a gentle invitation to reflect on our place in the endless dance of progress.
